variants.label: North bridge confirmed closed
assumptions: route north-bank -> shelter-a is confirmed closed by an authorized source

variants.label: South access restored and family-south verified
assumptions: route boat-base -> south-bank reopens after inspection
route south-bank -> shelter-a is verified by a patrol
request family-south is confirmed by an authorized operator

variants.label: Shelter A loses beds to flooding
assumptions: shelter-a reports 5 open beds instead of 12
